description.p: This update brings many bug fixes for 12.2's features, as well as a colorized server console.
This update brings several smaller features and some important bugfixes for Linux:

ul.li: A new sprees and multi-kills system
Pasting from the clipboard into the in-game console no longer crashes on Wayland
Window icons for the client and launcher appear more consistently on KDE Plasma and Raspberry Pi OS

description.p: This is primarily a bugfix update, addressing a few issues with skyboxes as well as other crashes.
This is a major update featuring support for DSDHacked, friendly monsters, many MBF21 bugfixes, and more!
An exploit where the toggle command could be used to bypass server control of cvars has been fixed.
This is just a small patch to fix a few issues encountered with 11.1.0, plus a few QoL features. See the release notes for more details!
First official Flathub release! Flatpak versions are now in line with the releases on other platforms.
